description: CompositionBlue printed kurti made of 100% cotton, with short raglan sleeves, has a split round neck, printed front panel with metallic embellishments and has pintucks on either side, with a curved hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this printed kurti from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh in this stylish kurti, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtisHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
